case_title: FERREY, GILBERT P et al vs. SUPERB SYSTEMS, INC., A CA CORP

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERREY, GILBERT P FERREY, CHARLOTTE M HUMMER, JOHN S SERVED OCT-15-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUPERB SYSTEMS, INC., A CA CORP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERREY, GILBERT P FERREY, CHARLOTTE M HUMMER, JOHN S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUPERB SYSTEMS, INC., A CA CORP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: A PARKING LOT AT THE SOUTH WEST CORNER OF THIRD OF 3RD ST., LEASE FORFEITED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERREY, GILBERT P FERREY, CHARLOTTE M HUMMER, JOHN S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUPERB SYSTEMS, INC., A CA CORP $7,276.78 RENT, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,450.78
